title: crotalaria filiformis var. kerrii
intro: Crotalaria filiformis var. kerrii, also known as Kerrii's weeping crotalaria, is a plant species in the legume family Fabaceae. This plant is used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Crotalaria filiformis var. kerrii include its potential to aid in the treatment of various health conditions, such as fever, cough, and respiratory infections, due to its expectorant and mucolytic properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
